testcase.name: should mark deleted seasons as DELETED when only some seasons exist in Jellyfin and Sonarr
should still mark deleted seasons when externalServiceId is null (no Sonarr link)
should mark deleted seasons even when Jellyfin returns empty season metadata entries (real-world behavior)
should assume season exists when getEpisodes fails (safe fallback)
should mark show as PARTIALLY_AVAILABLE when some seasons are available and some are unknown
testcase.failure: Show should be PARTIALLY_AVAILABLE when some seasons are available and some are unknown5 !== 4

failure.message: Show should be PARTIALLY_AVAILABLE when some seasons are available and some are unknown5 !== 4

testcase.failure:
[Error [ERR_TEST_FAILURE]: Show should be PARTIALLY_AVAILABLE when some seasons are available and some are unknown
5 !== 4 ] { code: 'ERR_TEST_FAILURE', failureType: 'testCodeFailure', cause: AssertionError [ERR_ASSERTION]: Show should be PARTIALLY_AVAILABLE when some seasons are available and some are unknown
5 !== 4
at TestContext.<anonymous> (/home/runner/work/seerr/seerr/server/lib/availabilitySync.test.ts:893:14) at async Test.run (node:internal/test_runner/test:1054:7) at async Suite.processPendingSubtests (node:internal/test_runner/test:744:7) { generatedMessage: false, code: 'ERR_ASSERTION', actual: 5, expected: 4, operator: 'strictEqual', diff: 'simple' } }

testcase.name: should mark deleted seasons when Plex returns empty season metadata entries
should assume season exists when getChildrenMetadata fails for episodes (safe fallback)
should mark deleted seasons when only some seasons have episodes in Plex (no Sonarr link)
should mark show as available when all non-empty TMDB seasons are fully scanned and an empty placeholder season exists in the DB
resets PROCESSING to UNKNOWN when movie is unmonitored and has no file
does not create new media entry when movie is unmonitored and has no file
sets AVAILABLE when movie has a file
sets PROCESSING when movie is monitored but has no file
preserves DELETED status when movie is monitored but has no file
keeps AVAILABLE status even when movie is unmonitored
skips cleanup when a standard server has sync disabled
resets PROCESSING to UNKNOWN when movie is not in any Radarr server
does not reset AVAILABLE movie when missing from Radarr
does not reset PROCESSING movie that still exists in Radarr
does not reset TV media that is missing from Radarr
only resets orphaned movies not found across all servers
resets 4k PROCESSING to UNKNOWN when movie is not in any Radarr server
does not reset 4k AVAILABLE when movie is missing from Radarr
skips cleanup when a standard server has sync disabled
resets PROCESSING to UNKNOWN when show is not in any Sonarr server
does not reset AVAILABLE show when missing from Sonarr
does not reset PROCESSING show that still exists in Sonarr
only resets season statuses that are PROCESSING on orphaned shows
does not reset movie media that is missing from Sonarr
only resets orphaned shows not found across all servers
skips shows without a tvdbId during cleanup
resets 4k PROCESSING to UNKNOWN when show is not in any Sonarr server
does not reset 4k AVAILABLE season when show is orphaned
re-requests DELETED watchlist items and skips non-requestable ones
re-requests DELETED watchlist items even when a stale auto-request exists
returns 403 when not authenticated
returns the authenticated user
includes userEmailRequired warning when email is required but invalid
returns 200 and user data on valid credentials
returns 403 on wrong password
returns 403 for nonexistent user
returns 500 when local login is disabled
returns 500 when email is missing
returns 500 when password is missing
is case-insensitive for email
allows the non-admin user to log in
sets a session on successful login
returns 200 when not logged in
destroys session and returns 200 when logged in
returns 200 for a valid email
returns 200 for nonexistent email (does not reveal user existence)
returns 500 when email is missing
sets a resetPasswordGuid on the user
resets password with a valid guid and password
returns 500 for an invalid guid
returns 500 when password is too short
returns 500 when password is missing
returns 500 for an expired recovery link
cannot reuse a guid after successful reset
allows the owner to delete their own pending request
allows an admin to delete any pending request
prevents a non-owner non-admin from deleting a pending request
prevents the owner from deleting an approved request
returns 404 for a non-existent request
persists server and root folder changes to the database
transitions to approved and records the acting user
transitions to declined and records the acting user
re-approves a failed request and records the acting user
restores media status to DELETED when the re-request is deleted and a stale completed request remains
restores media status4k to DELETED when the re-request is deleted and a stale completed request remains
resets media status to UNKNOWN when the stale completed request is also deleted
resets media status4k to UNKNOWN when the stale completed 4K request is also deleted
does not reset media status when other active requests still exist
does not reset media status when status is PARTIALLY_AVAILABLE and only completed requests remain
